debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ Set ↑A ∼ ↑(𝒫 A)

proof:
by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one
failed_attempts:
by
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image]; exists X; rfl⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; injection h with h'; exact val_image_one_one A X1 X2 h'
  · intro y; obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := y
    rw [← range_val_image] at hS; obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hS
    exists X; apply Subtype.ext; exact hX

by
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; injection h with h_val; exact h_val
  · intro S; rcases S with ⟨S, hS⟩; rw [← range_val_image] at hS
    rcases hS with ⟨X, hX⟩; exists X; exact Subtype.ext hX

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩
  exists f; constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro S; have hS := S.2; rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    rcases hS with ⟨X, hX⟩; exists X; apply Subtype.ext; exact hX

by
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩)
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; injection h with h_eq; exact h_eq
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩; rw [← range_val_image A] at hy; rcases hy with ⟨X, rfl⟩; exists X; rfl

by
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, (range_val_image A) ▸ ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; injection h with h1; exact val_image_one_one A _ _ h1
  · intro S; obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := (range_val_image A).symm ▸ S.property
    use X; exact Subtype.ext hX

by
  set f : Set A → 𝒫 A := λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exists X⟩
  exists f; constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A
    injection h with h1; exact h1
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩; rw [← range_val_image A] at hy
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hy; exists X; exact Subtype.ext hX

by
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    injection h with h1
    exact val_image_one_one A h1
  · intro ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hS
    exists X; exact Subtype.ext hX

by
  rewrite [← range_val_image A]
  apply range_equinum
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [←range_val_image A]; exists X⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro B
    have h := B.property
    rw [←range_val_image A] at h
    rcases h with ⟨X, hX⟩
    exists X; apply Subtype.ext; exact hX

by
  apply exists.intro (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    apply exists.intro X
    rfl⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intros ⟨y, hy⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hy
    rcases hy with ⟨X, hX⟩
    apply exists.intro X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX

{x | x.val ∈ S.val}
  exists f, g; apply conj_intro
  · apply funext; intro S; apply Subtype.ext
    ext y; constructor
    · intro h; rcases h with ⟨x, hx1, hx2⟩; rw [← hx2]; exact hx1
    · intro h; exists ⟨y, S.property h⟩; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩
  · apply funext; intro X; ext x; constructor
    · intro h; rcases h with ⟨x', hx'1, hx'2⟩; rwa [Subtype.ext hx'2] at hx'1
    · intro h; exists x; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩

by
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  apply And.intro
  · intro X1 X2 h; exact val_image_one_one A X1 X2 (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro S; have h := S.property; rw [← range_val_image A] at h
    rcases h with ⟨X, hX⟩; exists X; apply Subtype.ext; exact hX

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  use (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  use (λ S => {x | x.val ∈ S.val})
  constructor
  · ext S; apply Subtype.ext; ext y
    simp [val_image]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨x, h, rfl⟩; exact h
    · intro h; use ⟨y, S.2 h⟩; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩
  · ext X x; simp [val_image]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨x', h, hx'⟩; rw [← Subtype.ext hx' ]; exact h
    · intro h; use x; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩

by
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, range_val_image A ▸ ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    injection h with h
    exact val_image_one_one A _ _ h
  · intro S
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := (range_val_image A).symm ▸ S.2
    exists X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX
by rw [← range_val_image A]; exact range_equinum (val_image_one_one A)

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply range_equinum
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; apply mem_range_intro⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro S; rcases S with ⟨s, hs⟩; rw [← range_val_image A] at hs
    rcases hs with ⟨X, hX⟩; exists X; ext; exact hX

by
  exists (fun X => ⟨val_image A X, range_val_image A ▸ ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; injection h with h; exact h
  · intros Y
    have ⟨X, hX⟩ := (range_val_image A).symm ▸ Y.property
    exists X; exact Subtype.ext hX

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  apply exists.intro (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [←range_val_image]; exists.intro X; rfl⟩)
  apply exists.intro (λ Y => {x | x.val ∈ Y.val})
  constructor
  · apply funext; intro Y; apply Subtype.ext
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    constructor
    · assume h; rcases h with ⟨x, h1, rfl⟩; exact h1
    · assume h; exact ⟨⟨y, Y.2 h⟩, h, rfl⟩
  · apply funext; intro X; apply Set.ext; intro x
    constructor
    · assume h; rcases h with ⟨x', h1, h2⟩
      have h3 : x = x' := Subtype.ext h2
      rw [h3]; exact h1
    · assume h; exact ⟨x, h, rfl⟩

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exists X⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congrArg Subtype.val h
  · intro B
    have hB := B.property
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hB
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hB
    exists X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply range_equinum
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  use (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩)
  use (λ S a => a.val ∈ S.val)
  constructor
  · apply funext; intro S; apply Subtype.ext; ext y
    simp [val_image]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩; exact ha
    · intro hy; exact ⟨⟨y, S.property hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩
  · apply funext; intro X; ext a
    simp [val_image]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨x, hx, h⟩; rw [← Subtype.ext h]; exact hx
    · intro ha; exact ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; apply exists_intro X; rfl⟩
  apply exists_intro f
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h; apply val_image_one_one A; exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro S
    have h := S.2
    rw [← range_val_image A] at h
    let ⟨X, hX⟩ := h
    apply exists_intro X; exact Subtype.ext hX

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X; rfl⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congrArg Subtype.val h
  · rintro ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    rcases hS with ⟨X, rfl⟩
    exists X

by
  exists (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩)
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    injection h with h'
    exact val_image_one_one A h'
  · intro B
    rcases B with ⟨B_set, hB_mem⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hB_mem
    rcases hB_mem with ⟨X, hX⟩
    exists X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply range_equinum
  apply val_image_one_one A
successful_attempts:
by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range
  apply val_image_one_one

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image]
    exists X⟩
  let g : 𝒫 A → Set A := λ Y => {x : A | x.val ∈ Y.val}
  exists f, g
  apply And.intro
  · apply funext; intro Y
    apply Subtype.ext
    ext y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h
      let ⟨x, hx1, hx2⟩ := h
      rw [← hx2]
      exact hx1
    · intro hy
      exact ⟨⟨y, Y.property hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩
  · apply funext; intro X
    ext x
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h
      let ⟨x', hx'1, hx'2⟩ := h
      have hx'3 : x' = x := Subtype.ext hx'2
      rw [hx'3] at hx'1
      exact hx'1
    · intro hx
      exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩

by
  rewrite [←range_val_image A]
  apply equinum_range (val_image_one_one A)

by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    injection h with h_eq
    exact val_image_one_one A X1 X2 h_eq
  · rintro ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hS
    exists X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX

by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  use (λ X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← range_val_image A]; exists X⟩), (λ Y x => Y.val x.val)
  constructor
  · funext Y; apply Subtype.eq; apply funext; intro y; apply propext
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h; cases h with | intro x hx => cases hx with | intro hx1 hx2 => exact hx2 ▸ hx1
    · intro h; use ⟨y, Y.property h⟩; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩
  · funext X; apply funext; intro x; apply propext
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h; cases h with | intro x' hx' => cases hx' with | intro hx'1 hx'2 =>
      have h1 : x' = x := Subtype.ext hx'2; rwa [h1] at hx'1
    · intro hx; use x; exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩

by
  rw [← range_val_image A]
  exact equinum_range (val_image_one_one A)
